## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss project management challenges and strategize content creation approaches for clients.](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Miscommunication on contract terms led to unexpected client expectations (400 articles in 3 months)](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Team developing standardized process for efficient keyword research and content strategy across clients](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Need to improve onboarding and task delegation for new team members to reduce bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [Balancing client expectations with realistic content production and SEO strategy is crucial](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Topics

### Contract Misunderstanding and Resolution

  - [Client (Mark) expecting 400 articles in 3 months due to contract wording](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Actual capacity: \~100,000 words/month, totaling 300,000 words in 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Proposed solution: Offer 400 750-word articles if client insists, but advise against publishing that volume for a new domain](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Emphasize additional value: Webflow assistance, strategy support](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Content Strategy and Keyword Research Process

  - [Developing replicable process for all clients, similar to approach used for "RAM" client](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)
  - [Using competitor analysis: Identify top 10 sites targeting same audience](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Perform gap analysis on blog/guide content (non-product pages)](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Export data, compile into keyword research tool](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [Prioritize competitive opportunities first, then layer in zero-volume keywords](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Goal: Quantify opportunity (e.g., "400,000 volume here, 42,000 there") to impress clients](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

### Team Management and Scaling

  - [Need to identify high-potential new hire to shadow Marcel and Jimmy](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [Coach new team members on client interaction (e.g., allowing clients to speak more, not filling silences)](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
  - [Standardize processes to enable team members to replicate tasks efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)
  - [Considering hiring specialized talent (e.g., full-stack developer building AI content tool, Python expert from Deep Ram)](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)

### Client Onboarding and Document Management

  - [Challenge with Reddit: 30+ docs shared, access issues](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [Need dedicated account manager to process and organize client documents in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Suggestion: Ask clients to share entire folders for easier access management](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)

### Content Creation and SEO Strategy

  - [Balancing high-volume content creation with quality and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Exploring programmatic SEO approaches for faster content production](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Considering use of AI tools and automation to scale content creation](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Complete and present keyword research and content strategy for Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Standardize and document keyword research and content strategy process](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)
  - [Identify and assign a dedicated account manager for document processing and organization](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Prepare for Project Mark onboarding calls, focusing on asking questions and setting expectations](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)
  - [Explore hiring specialized talent to enhance content creation and SEO capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Address team bottlenecks by delegating tasks more effectively to new hires](https://fathom.video/share/Uq_G11uVE3vqiW-J9aieZhXnNJZbfy2k?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
